---
title: "About"
image: hamid2.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/adehamid
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hamid-adesokan-03258217/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/aadehamid

---

Hi, I am Hamid Adesokan. I am interested in the simple things that make up the complex. On this blog site, I will dive into the world of technology, where I unravel the complexities of artificial intelligence, data engineering, data strategy, systems, and more for my understanding. 'Simple Threads in a Complex Web' offers a unique perspective, simplifying the intricate aspects of tech innovations. Join me to explore how the simplest ideas weave into the vast tapestry of technological advancements.
